purpose: Prerequisite videos for Grade 4 Chapter 2: Hide and Seek
description: Videos covering: left-right directions, above-below concepts, basic shape recognition

videos.title: The Left vs. Right Song! | Learn Directions for Kids
videos.description: A fun song to learn the difference between left and right. Sing along and move your body to feel left and right directions!

videos.title: Position Words: Above, Below, Beside, Between | Math for Kids
videos.description: Learn important position words like above, below, beside, between, in front of, and behind. These words help us describe where things are!
learningObjectives: Describe object locations using position words

videos.title: 3D Shapes for Kids | Recognizing Shapes from Different Angles
videos.description: Review 3D shapes like cubes, spheres, cylinders, and cones. See how the same shape can look different depending on which side you look at.
learningObjectives: Understand that shapes look different from different angles

usageNotes.purpose: Review directions, position words, and basic shapes before learning about views, grids, and maps
usageNotes.recommendationStrategy: Select based on weak concepts identified in readiness assessment
usageNotes.sequencing: Left/Right directions -> Position words -> Shape recognition from different angles
